4.2.1 ESRD V21 Scores 

Individuals who experience ESRD have high medical costs and more extensive medical needs than the general 
Medicare population; therefore, this group of individuals has their own HCC model. The ESRD HCC model divides the 
population into four segments: 1) those undergoing dialysis, 2) those who have received kidney transplants
